## Habitat benchmark — refactored frs_habitat
## Date: 2026-04-05
## DB: local Docker fwapg (port 5432, 32GB shared_buffers)
## Branch: refactor-habitat
## Issue: #83, #89

## Setup
# frs_habitat wrapping frs_network_segment + frs_habitat_classify
# Break sources: falls (blocked) — gradient barriers auto-generated
# Parallel: 4 mirai workers

## Results
# ADMS: 16,606 segments, 5 species, 781s (13 min)
# BULK: 46,419 segments, 7 species, 2,090s (35 min)
# Total (parallel): 2,091s (35 min)

## Bottleneck
# frs_habitat_classify NOT EXISTS query runs once per species
# CO/CH/SK share 15% threshold — 3x redundant work
# Breaks table label filter unindexed (sequential scan)
# Fix: #89 — recycle accessibility by threshold group + composite index

## Comparison
# Old pipeline (v0.7.0, per-species tables): ADMS 87s
# New unified (sequential): ADMS 183s
# New unified (parallel, 4 workers): ADMS+BULK 2,091s
# Province estimate at current rate: ~days
# Province estimate with #89 fix: ~hours
